sections.paragraph:
ἀρχοντικός, ή, όν (s. ἄρχων; Herm. Wr. 1, 25; Anth. Pal. 9, 763; Vett. Val. 14, 24f; 70, 8; 355, 33; pap) pert. to primary leadership obligations at various administrative levels, commanding (s. ἄρχων 2; used of angels ἀρχοντικός Celsus 6, 27; 35; Kephal. I, 53, 7) in ref. to angels συστάσεις ἀ. assemblages of the (celestial) commanders ITr 5:2.—DELG s.v. ἄρχω C p. 120.

Herm. Wr. Herm. Wr. = Hermetic Writings—List 5

pap pap = papyrus, -yri

pert. pert. = pertaining (to)

Celsus Celsus , in Origen, Contra Celsum, II a.d.—List 5

Kephal Kephal = Manichäische Handschriften der Staatlichen Museen Berlin, date uncertain—List 5

ref. ref. = reference(s)

ITr ITr = Ignatius to the Trallians—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 140
